meaning: n.宝石,珍宝,精华,被喜爱的人,美玉
examples: Wisdom without morality is like a ring without a gem.
There is an object relational mapper out there that is a hidden gem.
It's not as popular as Central Park. But I feel like it's kind of a hidden gem.
Few people seem to know about this gem, so you are likely to have it to yourself.
Rothman has made a five-minute instructional video on gem-cutting that his dealers can hand out like business cards.
